creator: iluxa@ex.ua
text:
playonbsd-4.2.10 doesn't create any shortcuts at all,not only *.desktop shortcut, it doesn't create shortcut to an app in PlaOnBSD window too.
Unfortunately I didn't found any solution, except to create manually PlayOnBSD shortcut in ~/.PlayOnBSD/shortcuts and then to create *.desktop shortcut in ~/Desktop .
